//cowork: On current builds, user-level ~/.claude hooks DO fire in Cowork (sessions launch with --setting-sources=user,project,local), so a global install (install.py --global) also works. This project-level wiring is still valid. Merge these hooks blocks into your existing settings.json; do not clobber other entries.
//v030: Disarm is human-only (release passphrase); the agent cannot stop a sprint. See README.
